title: Naked and Afraid
subTitle: Several pairs of total strangers have to survive the extreme environment and dangerous wildlife of the wilderness, naked and afraid.

title: Naked and Afraid XL
subTitle: Matt puts himself at risk of a challenge-ending injury for a potential big alligator win. Massive storms send Steven on a desperate search for resources. The swamp claims its first victim as one all-star calls it quits.

title: Naked and Afraid
subTitle: Several pairs of total strangers have to survive the extreme environment and dangerous wildlife of the wilderness, naked and afraid.

title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls
subTitle: Survivalist Bear Grylls takes popular stars on a rigorous journey where they are faced with inhospitable conditions in order to survive.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: Bear paraglides into the Rockies, traverses huge waterfalls and navigates deep gullies before leaping onto a moving train.

title: Dual Survival
subTitle: Survival experts Cody Lundin and Dave Canterbury take on the planet's most unforgiving terrains and demonstrate valuable survival skills.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: Bear Grylls travels around Southern China after a typhoon and conquers swollen rivers. He also gets bitten by cruel ants.

title: Gold Rush
subTitle: Tony battles to save his cuts and millions of dollars in gold when snow melt swamps Paradise Hill. Fred's head is nearly taken off when sourcing a new wash plant.

subTitle: An adventurer embarks on admission, traversing diverse unknown regions, exploring the place with minimal support and gears.

subTitle: Bear Grylls demonstrates all the techniques and skills that are required in order to stay alive in the dangerous waters of the Everglades.

subTitle: Ed heads to the deserts of Namibia to test his survival skills. As it is the end of the dry season, Ed must build his strength in the fierce heat to hunt the elusive warthog.

subTitle: Bear Grylls emulates the personality of Tarzan as he navigates through the jungles of Belize, where he comes face to face with a 9 foot boa constrictor.

subTitle: From hand crafting a bird nuggets to ward off starvation, to skinning pelts with their bare hands, watch as each couple battles the elements, each other, and their own inner weaknesses.
